2605.30332.caption: ODESDECNS (Ours)Figure 1:Colored Noise Sampling (CNS). Samples from SiT-XL/2 on ImageNet-256 (with CFG) for different sampling strategies. While standard SDEs inject uniform white noise, our Colored Noise Sampling (CNS) dynamically reallocates injected stochastic energy to unresolved frequency bands. This actively leverages the network’s spectral bias to systematically steer the output toward the true data manifold, outperforming standard ODE and SDE solvers.
2605.30332.caption_zh: 图1：彩色噪声采样（CNS）。来自SiT-XL/2模型在ImageNet-256（使用分类器引导）上采用不同采样策略的生成样本。标准随机微分方程注入均匀白噪声，而我们的彩色噪声采样（CNS）则动态地将注入的随机能量重新分配至未解析的频带。该方法主动利用网络的光谱偏置，系统性地将输出引导至真实数据流形，其表现优于标准的常微分方程与随机微分方程求解器。

2605.30332.caption: Figure 4:The Spectral Gap Across Sampling Methods.(Left)PSDs of the generated distributions versus the PSD of the ground truth ImageNet. Standard ODE sampling over-generates low-frequency structures and under-generates high-frequency details, while standard SDE sampling exhibits an energy deficit across the entire spectrum.(Right)The signedlog10\log_{10}error relative to the ground truth (black dashed line). By dynamically reallocating the injected noise budget, CNS better aligns the generated spectrum with the true data manifold, mitigating the spectral gap and achieving the lowest log-space Mean Absolute Error (MAE) across frequencies.
2605.30332.caption_zh: 图 4：不同采样方法下的谱间隙。（左）生成分布的功率谱密度（PSD）与真实 ImageNet 数据 PSD 的对比。标准 ODE 采样会过度生成低频结构并欠生成高频细节，而标准 SDE 采样在整个频谱上均表现出能量不足。（右）相对于真实数据（黑色虚线）的带符号对数误差（以 10 为底）。通过动态重新分配注入的噪声预算，CNS 使生成频谱更贴合真实数据流形，从而缓解谱间隙，并在各频率上实现了最低的对数空间平均绝对误差（MAE）。

2605.30332.caption: \phantomcaption\phantomcaptionFigure 5:Noise Signal Preservation and Transfer.(Left)Initial Noise Persistence. Cosine similarity between initial noise and the final generated image. ODEs strongly preserve structural information across the spectrum; stochastic methods (SDE, CNS) still retain a significant, though reduced, amount of this initial signal.(Right)Cumulative Injection Transfer. Cosine similarity between total injected noise (ϵcumul\epsilon_{\text{cumul}}) and the final generated image. This shows injected noise structure actively shapes the final features rather than serving as a temporary perturbation. Notably, CNS selectively routes this signal into higher frequency bands.
2605.30332.caption_zh: 图5：噪声信号保持与传递。（左）初始噪声的持久性。初始噪声与最终生成图像之间的余弦相似度。常微分方程（ODE）方法在整个频谱范围内强烈保持了结构信息；随机方法（SDE, CNS）虽有所减少，但仍保留了相当一部分初始信号。（右）累积注入转移。总注入噪声（ϵcumul）与最终生成图像之间的余弦相似度。这表明注入的噪声结构主动塑造了最终特征，而非仅作为临时扰动。值得注意的是，CNS（连续噪声缩放）选择性地将此信号导向更高频带。

2605.30231.caption: Figure 2:Injecting the Geometric-Aware Spatial Priors (GASP) into VLMs.Standard approaches rely on fine-tuning with 3D VQA datasets, which may encourage memorizing dataset-specific biases. We instead insert a small correspondence head into the intermediate layers of the LLM backbone. During the training phase, this head is supervised by visual correspondence and depth consistency signals derived from ground-truth point tracks and depth maps. At inference, the head is discarded and the model processes inputs (e.g., VQA) as a standard VLM, without any auxiliary 3D input. Note that the 3D scene example shown is from EgoHumans[24]for illustration; our training data is sourced from DL3DV[30].
2605.30231.caption_zh: 图2：将几何感知空间先验（GASP）注入视觉语言模型（VLMs）。标准方法依赖于使用三维视觉问答数据集进行微调，这可能促使模型记忆数据集特定的偏差。相反，我们在LLM骨干网络的中间层插入了一个小型对应头。在训练阶段，该对应头通过从真实点轨迹和深度图提取的视觉对应与深度一致性信号进行监督。在推理时，该对应头被丢弃，模型作为标准VLM处理输入（例如视觉问答），无需任何辅助三维输入。注意，所示三维场景示例来自EgoHumans[24]用于示意；我们的训练数据来源于DL3DV[30]。

2605.30231.caption: Figure 1:Top: Our proposed framework (GASP) learns geometric consistency by injecting the correspondence head into the LLM, supervised by 3D spatial priors.Bottom: Standard spatial VLMs rely on fine-tuning with 3D VQA datasets, which often leads to memorizing data-specific biases.Note that our GASP requires no 3D prior input and processes as a standard VLM during inference.
2605.30231.caption_zh: 图 1：上图：我们提出的框架（GASP）通过将对应关系头注入 LLM 中来学习几何一致性，并以 3D 空间先验进行监督。下图：标准的空间 VLM 依赖于 3D VQA 数据集的微调，这通常导致模型记忆数据特定的偏差。注意，我们的 GASP 在推理时不需要 3D 先验输入，且处理方式与标准 VLM 相同。

2605.30231.caption: Figure 3:Analysis of visual correspondence learning.On LLaVA-NeXT-Video-7B (top row) and Qwen2.5-VL-7B (bottom row). We compare(a, d)layer-wise correspondence matching accuracy (PCK),(b, e)confidence-accuracy correlation (ρ\rho), and(c, f)temporal robustness for our proposed GASP models against the baselines. Shaded regions indicate standard deviation across 200 test sequences.
2605.30231.caption_zh: 图3：视觉对应性学习分析结果。基于LLaVA-NeXT-Video-7B（上排）与Qwen2.5-VL-7B（下排）模型。我们对比了所提出的GASP模型与基线在以下方面的性能：(a, d) 分层对应匹配准确率（PCK）、(b, e) 置信度‑准确率相关性（ρ），以及 (c, f) 时间鲁棒性。阴影区域表示在200条测试序列上的标准差。

2605.30060.caption:
Figure 3:Architecture overview ofViGeo.
Built upon a plain Transformer with dynamic chunking attention, ViGeo supports full-sequence, streaming, and long-video inference within a unified model and predicts temporally consistent depth, surface normals, and point maps.
2605.30060.caption_zh: 图 3：ViGeo 架构总览。该模型基于采用动态分块注意力的朴素 Transformer 构建，可在统一的框架内支持全序列、流式及长视频推理，并预测时序一致性的深度图、表面法线图与点云图。

2605.30060.caption:
Figure 4:Visualization of our completion-based data refinement pipeline.
Given an RGB video sequence and raw depth maps with missing regions and noisy measurements, we first apply per-frame outlier filtering to obtain reliable sparse observations, and then construct dense but coarse depth priors via Poisson reconstruction.
A video depth completion teacher refines these priors by leveraging temporal and multi-view context, producing sharp and coherent dense depth labels.
The bottom row compares the corresponding point clouds, where our refined labels reduce missing regions, flying points, and geometric artifacts.
2605.30060.caption_zh: 图 4：基于补全的数据精修流程可视化。给定 RGB 视频序列及存在缺失区域和噪声测量的原始深度图，我们首先进行逐帧离群值滤波以获得可靠的稀疏观测，随后通过泊松重建构建稠密但粗糙的深度先验。视频深度补全教师模型利用时序与多视角上下文对这些先验进行优化，生成清晰且连贯的稠密深度标签。底部行对比了对应的点云，可见经精修的标签减少了缺失区域、漂浮点及几何伪影。

2605.30060.caption: Figure 9:Qualitative ablation of our data refinement pipeline. Our full pipeline effectively resolves the severe missing regions in raw points and the flying points introduced by Poisson reconstruction, yielding clean and structurally coherent 3D geometries.
2605.30060.caption_zh: 图9：数据优化流程的定性消融实验。我们的完整流程有效解决了原始点云中严重的缺失区域以及泊松重建引入的悬浮点问题，从而得到结构清晰、几何连贯的三维模型。

2605.30346.caption:
Figure 3:Overview of the YoCausal evaluation framework.(a) Dataset Construction:We construct an infinitely extensible benchmark by using real-world videos from different domains.
By applying zero-cost temporal reversal, we generate natural counterfactual pairs (forwardxfx^{f}and reversexrx^{r}).(b) Level 1 Temporal Perception:Identical sampled noiseϵ\epsilonis added to both sequences and compute their denoising losses.
Reverse Surprise Index (RSI), quantifies the model’s perception of the arrow of time by measuring the proportion of instances where the reversed video has a higher loss (ℒr>ℒf\mathcal{L}_{r}>\mathcal{L}_{f}).(c) Level 2 Causality Disentanglement:To disentangle genuine causal cognition from statistical temporal biases, a Vision-Language Model (VLM) divides the dataset into causal (𝒟c\mathcal{D}_{c}) and non-causal (𝒟n​c\mathcal{D}_{nc}) subsets.
The Level-2 metric, Causality Cognition Index (CCI), is computed as the difference in RSI between these subsets, isolating the model’s genuine causal cognition ability.
2605.30346.caption_zh: 图 3：YoCausal 评估框架概览。（a）数据集构建：通过使用来自不同领域的真实世界视频，构建一个可无限扩展的基准。通过应用零成本时序反转，生成自然的反事实对（正向 x^f 和反向 x^r）。（b）第一级时序感知：向两个序列添加相同的采样噪声 ε，并计算它们的去噪损失。反向惊奇指数（RSI）通过测量反向视频损失更高（ℒ_r > ℒ_f）的实例比例，量化模型对时间箭头的感知能力。（c）第二级因果关系解耦：为将真正的因果认知与统计性时序偏差分离，视觉语言模型（VLM）将数据集划分为因果子集（𝒟_c）和非因果子集（𝒟_nc）。第二级指标——因果认知指数（CCI）计算为这些子集之间 RSI 的差值，从而分离出模型真正的因果认知能力。

2605.30346.caption:
Figure 4:Key idea behind CCI.Reversing a non-causal video (e.g.a car cruising) introduces only
one source of abnormality: reversed arrow of time. While,
a causal video (e.g.a hammer shattering a vase) introduces an
additional source: reversed causality. A causally aware model should
perceive more abnormality in the reversed causal video, exhibiting
greater surprise (higher RSI). The gapCCI=RSI​(𝒟c)−RSI​(𝒟n​c)\mathrm{CCI}=\mathrm{RSI}(\mathcal{D}_{c})-\mathrm{RSI}(\mathcal{D}_{nc})thus disentangles the model’s
sensitivity to causality from its sensitivity to statistical
temporal patterns.
2605.30346.caption_zh: 图 4：CCI 的核心思想。反转非因果视频（如汽车巡航）仅引入一种异常来源：时间箭头的反转。而反转因果视频（如锤子击碎花瓶）会引入另一个额外来源：因果关系的反转。具备因果感知能力的模型应在反转因果视频中感知到更多异常，表现出更强的“惊讶”（更高的 RSI）。因此，差距 CCI=RSI(𝒟_c)−RSI(𝒟_nc) 将模型对因果关系的敏感度与其对统计性时间模式的敏感度分离开来。

2605.30346.caption: Figure 2:Conceptual overview of YoCausal benchmark.We draw inspiration from theViolation of Expectation (VoE)paradigm in cognitive science.(Left)Infants show surprise when seeing videos played in reverse (bottom), violating their intuitive causal cognition[65](⇢\dashrightarrow).(Right)We transfer this paradigm to generative models: treating the learned data distribution as the model’s cognition, a causally-aware VDM should assign lower probability (higher denoising loss) to counterfactual reversed videos than to forward ones. This elegant analogy allows us to benchmark causal understanding using arbitrarily scalable real-world videos.
2605.30346.caption_zh: 图2：YoCausal基准的概念概述。我们借鉴了认知科学中的期望违背范式。（左）婴儿看到倒放视频（下图）时会表现出惊讶，这违背了其直觉因果认知[65]（⇢）。（右）我们将这一范式迁移到生成模型：将学习到的数据分布视为模型的认知，具有因果感知能力的视频扩散模型应当为反事实的倒放视频分配比正放视频更低的概率（更高的去噪损失）。这一巧妙的类比使我们能够利用任意规模的真实世界视频来评估因果理解能力。

2605.30076.caption:
Figure 1:Overview ofUniSteer.
(a) During training, residual-stream activations are extracted from selected layers and token positions of a frozen language model and paired with natural-language conditions.
A frozen condition model encodes the textual condition, andUniSteerlearns a text-guided conditional flow in activation space via flow matching.
(b) During inference,UniSteerperforms activation steering through flow inversion.
A source activation is first transported backward along the source-conditioned flow to an intermediate noisy latent state, and then transported forward under the target condition to obtain an edited activation.
The edited activation is injected back into the frozen language model to steer generation.
2605.30076.caption_zh:
图1：UniSteer 方法概览。
(a) 训练阶段：从一个冻结的语言模型中选取特定层和词元位置，提取其残差流激活值，并与自然语言条件配对。一个冻结的条件模型对文本条件进行编码，UniSteer 通过流匹配在激活空间中学得一个文本引导的条件流。
(b) 推理阶段：UniSteer 通过流逆反进行激活导向。源激活首先沿源条件流反向传输至一个中间噪声潜状态，随后在目标条件下前向传输，以获得编辑后的激活。编辑后的激活被重新注入冻结的语言模型中，以引导生成过程。

2605.30076.caption:
Figure 2:Activation-space classification withUniSteer.
Given a test sample, we extract its residual-stream activation from a frozen language model and evaluate it under multiple candidate textual conditions.
For each condition,UniSteerperforms a short flow-inversion reconstruction cycle: the activation is inverted to an intermediate latent state and then reconstructed under the same condition.
The candidate with the lowest reconstruction energy is selected as the predicted label.
2605.30076.caption_zh: 图2：基于UniSteer的激活空间分类方法。给定测试样本，我们从冻结的语言模型中提取其残差流激活，并在多个候选文本条件下进行评估。针对每个条件，UniSteer执行一次简短的流逆重构循环：先将激活反演为中间隐状态，随后在同一条件下进行重构。选择重构能量最低的候选条件作为预测标签。

2605.30076.caption:
Figure 3:Token-level alignment betweenUniSteeredits and CAA constraint directions.
For thestart_withconstraint, edits at start-position tokens show higher cosine similarity with the CAAstart_withdirection than edits at other positions.
2605.30076.caption_zh: 图3：UniSteer编辑与CAA约束方向在词元层面的对齐关系。对于“start_with”约束，起始位置词元的编辑与CAA“start_with”方向的余弦相似度高于其他位置的编辑。

2605.30248.caption: Figure 3:Overall architecture of the proposed framework.By emulating the human drawing workflow, the agentic pipeline is decoupled into three corresponding layers: (1) Cognitive Structuring Layer (Think) for intent understanding, context search, and complex reasoning; (2) Executable Canvas Layer (Sketch), which uses code as a "digital paintbrush" to construct precise intermediate layouts; and (3) Visual Generation and Review Layer (Color) for final image rendering and VLM-based validation.
2605.30248.caption_zh: 图 3：所提框架的整体架构。通过模拟人类绘图工作流程，该智能体流程被解耦为三个对应层：(1) 认知结构层（思考），用于意图理解、上下文搜索与复杂推理；(2) 可执行画布层（草图），使用代码作为“数字画笔”来构建精确的中间布局；(3) 视觉生成与评审层（上色），用于最终图像渲染及基于视觉语言模型的验证。

2605.30248.caption: Figure 1:Code-Driven Agentic Image Generation.Existing methods are bottlenecked by end-to-end black-box pixel generators, relying solely on prompt modification for repeated trial-and-error and stochastic sampling.In contrast, GenClaw mimics human creation (conceptualize → sketch → color) by decoupling comprehension from generation. It leverages search and reasoning for context, employs code as a "paintbrush" for precise layout planning, and finally renders the visual output.
2605.30248.caption_zh: 图 1：代码驱动的智能体图像生成。现有方法受限于端到端的黑盒像素生成器，仅能依赖提示修改进行重复试错与随机采样。相比之下，GenClaw 通过将理解与生成过程解耦，模拟人类创作流程（概念构思 → 草图绘制 → 上色渲染）。它利用搜索与推理获取上下文信息，将代码作为“画笔”进行精准的布局规划，最终渲染生成视觉输出。

2605.30248.caption: Figure 4:Qualitative comparison of instruction following in complex compositions.Compared to purely text-driven traditional generation, GenClaw leverages LLMs to generate SVG code for explicit layout planning, demonstrating superior performance in complex object counting and multi-attribute binding tasks.
2605.30248.caption_zh: 图 4：复杂组合中指令遵循的定性比较。与纯文本驱动的传统生成方法相比，GenClaw 利用大语言模型生成 SVG 代码以进行显式布局规划，在复杂对象计数与多属性绑定任务中展现出更优的性能。

2605.27891.caption: Figure 3:Overview of the proposed SmartDirector framework.SmartDirector is a two-stage framework for keyframe-conditioned video generation. In the first stage, Director-Gen synthesizes a low-resolution video from the provided keyframes via a Multi-Chunk VAE that encodes chunks independently at keyframe boundaries and a Multi-Chunk DiT with full spatio-temporal attention and MC-RoPE for coherent cross-chunk modeling. In the second stage, Director-SR refines the low-resolution output into a high-resolution video under the guidance of high-resolution keyframes.
2605.27891.caption_zh: 图 3：所提出的 SmartDirector 框架概览。SmartDirector 是一个面向关键帧引导的视频生成的两阶段框架。在第一阶段，Director-Gen 通过多区块 VAE（在关键帧边界处独立编码各区块）以及具有全时空注意力与 MC-RoPE（用于实现连贯的跨区块建模）的多区块 DiT，基于输入的关键帧合成低分辨率视频。在第二阶段，Director-SR 在高分辨率关键帧的引导下，将低分辨率输出细化为高分辨率视频。

2605.27891.caption: Figure 4:Overview of the data pipeline.Starting from large-scale cinematic videos, we perform shot segmentation with AutoShot and VLM-based multi-shot aggregation, and then generate structured captions that cover camera motion, per-character appearance, and a holistic description of the whole multi-shot sequence together with descriptions of each individual shot.
2605.27891.caption_zh: 图 4：数据处理流程概览。从大规模影视视频出发，我们使用 AutoShot 进行镜头分割并执行基于视觉语言模型的多镜头聚合，进而生成结构化描述，涵盖摄像机运动、角色外观、整个多镜头序列的整体描述以及每个独立镜头的描述。

2605.27891.caption: Figure 2:SmartDirector is a flexible frameworkthat accommodates diverse input conditions and supports a wide range of generation tasks, including first-frame-to-video, last-frame-to-video, multi-shot synthesis, and video extension.
2605.27891.caption_zh: 图 2：SmartDirector 是一个灵活的框架，能够适应多样化的输入条件，并支持广泛的生成任务，包括首帧转视频、末帧转视频、多镜头合成以及视频扩展。

2605.30263.caption: Figure 1:Overview of minWM.minWM is a full-stack pipeline that converts T2V/TI2V foundation models into camera-controllable few-step autoregressive world models, covering data construction, controllable fine-tuning, AR training, distillation, and low-latency inference.
2605.30263.caption_zh: 图1：minWM 框架概览。minWM 是一个全栈流程，将 T2V/TI2V 基础模型转化为相机可控的少步自回归世界模型，涵盖数据构建、可控微调、自回归训练、蒸馏以及低延迟推理。

2605.30263.caption: (a)Training with estimated camera poses.In our experiments, models trained directly on SpatialVid[wang2025spatialvid]data did not achieve reliable camera-controllable generation under our current setup, even after additional data filtering. We hypothesize that this may be related to the use of perception-estimated camera poses, which motivates our exploration of datasets with effectively ground-truth trajectories.(b)Training with reconstructed scenes and rendered trajectories.By reconstructing scenes from DL3DV[ling2024dl3dv]and rendering videos along prescribed camera trajectories, the model successfully learns camera-controllable generation, indicating the importance of accurate camera trajectories.(c)Training with WorldPlay-generated trajectories.For the open-source setting, we construct videos from OpenVid[nan2024openvid]and other image sources using WorldPlay[sun2025worldplay]with specified camera trajectories, which likewise enables the model to learn camera controllability.Figure 3:Effect of training data on camera-controllable generation.Under our current setup, directly training with SpatialVid did not yet yield reliable camera-controllable generation. We therefore construct datasets with effectively ground-truth camera trajectories, either through 3D reconstruction and re-rendering or WorldPlay-based generation, which enable the model to learn camera controllability.
2605.30263.caption_zh: (a) 使用估计相机姿态进行训练。在我们的实验中，直接使用 SpatialVid[wang2025spatialvid] 数据进行训练的模型，即使经过额外的数据过滤，在当前设置下也未能实现可靠的相机可控生成。我们推测这可能与使用了感知估计的相机姿态有关，这促使我们探索具有有效真实轨迹的数据集。(b) 使用重建场景与渲染轨迹进行训练。通过从 DL3DV[ling2024dl3dv] 重建场景并沿指定相机轨迹渲染视频，模型成功学会了相机可控生成，这表明精确相机轨迹的重要性。(c) 使用 WorldPlay 生成的轨迹进行训练。在开源设置中，我们使用 WorldPlay[sun2025worldplay] 及指定相机轨迹，基于 OpenVid[nan2024openvid] 和其他图像源构建视频，这同样使模型能够学会相机可控性。图 3：训练数据对相机可控生成的影响。在当前设置下，直接使用 SpatialVid 训练尚未产生可靠的相机可控生成。因此，我们通过 3D 重建与重新渲染，或基于 WorldPlay 的生成，构建了具有有效真实相机轨迹的数据集，从而使模型能够学习相机可控性。

2605.30263.caption: (a)Early-stage training.After only one to two thousand training steps, the HY1.5-based bidirectional model has not yet acquired effective camera controllability.(b)Emerging controllability.After around five thousand training steps, the model begins to respond to camera-control signals, but the controllability is still unstable.(c)Strong controllability.After eight thousand training steps, the model achieves substantially stronger and more reliable camera-controllable generation.Figure 4:Effect of training steps on camera-controllable generation.Using HY1.5 as an example, we observe that camera controllability emerges progressively during training: the model is largely uncontrollable at one to two thousand steps, starts to acquire controllability around five thousand steps, and reaches strong controllability after eight thousand steps.
2605.30263.caption_zh: (a) 早期训练阶段。经过仅一千至两千次训练步数后，基于HY1.5的双向模型尚未获得有效的相机控制能力。(b) 控制能力初现阶段。约五千次训练步数后，模型开始对相机控制信号产生响应，但控制稳定性仍不足。(c) 强控制能力阶段。八千次训练步数后，模型实现了显著更强且更可靠的相机可控生成效果。图4：训练步数对相机可控生成的影响。以HY1.5为例，我们观察到相机控制能力在训练过程中逐步显现：模型在一千至两千步时基本不可控，约五千步时开始获得控制能力，八千步后达到强控制能力。

2605.30073.caption:
Figure 2:Overview of NAVA.NAVA adopts anAlign-then-Fuse MMDiTarchitecture, which first establishes native audio-video correspondence viaHierarchical Alignment Layers, and subsequently performs collaborative denoising usingUnified Fusion Layers.
Textual context and optional reference timbre are injected through cross-attention, whileTimbre-in-Context Conditioningbinds timbre cues to speech spans for controllable multi-speaker generation.
2605.30073.caption_zh: 图2：NAVA 概览。NAVA 采用“对齐-融合”式 MMDiT 架构，首先通过分层对齐层建立原生音视频对应关系，随后利用统一融合层进行协作去噪。文本上下文及可选参考音色通过交叉注意力注入，而上下文音色条件机制则将音色线索与语音片段绑定，以实现可控的多说话人生成。

2605.30073.caption:
Figure 1:Comparison of different audio-visual generation paradigms.(a)Dual-Tower: Separate audio and video feature spaces with late-stage cross-modal alignment.
(b)Fully Unified: A single tri-modal space that couples context conditioning and synchronization.
(c)NAVA: Dedicated audio-video alignment followed by external context conditioning for controllable generation.
2605.30073.caption_zh: 图 1：不同视听生成范式的比较。(a) 双塔式：音频与视频特征空间分离，后期进行跨模态对齐。(b) 完全统一式：单一的 trimodal 空间，将上下文条件与同步进行耦合。(c) NAVA：先进行专门的音视频对齐，再通过外部上下文条件实现可控生成。

2605.30073.caption:
Figure 3:Qualitative visualization of NAVA.We present various generated video frames, audio waveforms, and event-level annotations across diverse scenarios, including complex speech scenes, dynamic motion, musical performance, multi-speaker dialogue, and shot transitions.
The annotations highlight how the generated sounds are temporally aligned with visual events, such as silence, explosions, riding motion, instrumental performances, speaker turns, chopping sounds, and scene cuts.
Overall, NAVA produces semantically coherent audio-visual outputs with diverse sound events, scene-aware acoustics, and controllable speaker assignment.
2605.30073.caption_zh: 图 3：NAVA 的定性可视化展示。我们在多样场景（包括复杂语音场景、动态运动、音乐表演、多说话人对话及镜头切换）中展示了生成的视频帧、音频波形及事件级标注。标注突显了生成声音如何与视觉事件（如静默、爆炸、骑行运动、乐器演奏、说话人轮换、切菜声和场景切换）在时间上对齐。总体而言，NAVA 能生成语义一致的音视频输出，具备多样的声音事件、场景感知的声学特性以及可控的说话人分配。
